notes.text: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: has correct tooltip for date/time options
sap.m.DynamicDateRange: align height to content
sap.m.ObjectListItem: invisible markers are not added to ARIA
sap.m.Image: inlineSVG mode now scopes IDs to prevent duplicates
We now ensure that ActionTile avoids the default link behaviour when the action buttons are clicked
sap.m.ObjectMarker: focus of icon only marker is correct now
sap.m.MultiInput: focus is now kept when icons are pressed
sap.m.PlanningCalendar: remove redundant labelled by reference
sap.m.ProgressIndicator: Improve sample
sap.m.OverfloToolbar: Sample update
sap.m.Avatar: Suppress warnings for empty initials
sap.m.StepInput: formatting is improved.
sap.m.MultiInput: Prevent caret movement on Esc when value is already restored
sap.m.Tokenizer: Tokens list items type is now 'Inactive'
sap.m.Toolbar: Update sample
sap.m.Avatar: Sample tooltip is now corrected
SelectionPanel: Don't hide selected descriptions
sap.m.DatePicker: user input is not overwritten when value is
sap.m.Tokenizer: Prevent focus on List dummy areas in tokens popup
sap.m.RadioButtonGroup: useEntireWidth property behavior is fixed
sap.m.Carousel: Fixed focus management when scrollMode is set to "VisiblePages"
sap.m.IconTabHeader: Restore focus to overflow button after changing from "start" to "end"
